summary: Verstappen hunts pole position and victory against Hamilton's Ferrari resurgence at a track tailor-made for Red Bull's speed, though the reigning champion wheels a revised rear wing after consecutive high-speed crashes. McLaren's Lando Norris battles uphill from a 10-place grid penalty, forcing a strategic gamble on tire strategy and undercut opportunities to salvage points from the midfield. A dominant Verstappen result compounds his championship lead while Hamilton's performance will signal whether Ferrari possesses genuine pace to challenge for the title stretch.
